news.title: Quad Green renovations will create an outdoor destination for students
news.summary_en: Renovations to Quad Green will turn the space between the College of Pharmacy Building and Hillcrest Residence Hall into an area for relaxation and recreation. The area will feature a pavilion with outdoor furniture, two pickleball courts, a basketball court, and new sidewalks.

news.title: UI recognizes faculty, staff award recipients at annual ceremony
